basic_details.job_title: KPCL Assistant Legal Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Karnataka Power Corporation (KPCL) Assistant Legal Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website of Karnataka Power Corporation (KPCL). A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the KPCL Assistant Legal Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 28 years Maximum Age: 56 years

qualification.details: Degree in Law from a recognized university. Minimum 40% marks in Kannada in the Degree in Law. Registration certificate from Karnataka State Bar Council.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KPCL Assistant Legal Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KPCL Assistant Legal Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the KPCL Assistant Legal Officer recruitment is 22 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Legal Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Assistant Legal Officer position in the Karnataka Power Corporation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Legal Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Law from a recognized university, with a minimum of 40% marks in Kannada and a registration certificate from the Karnataka State Bar Council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Assistant Legal Officer post is between 28 years (minimum) and 56 years (maximum).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Legal Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Legal Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 65,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for this recruitment must be submitted via Email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the KPCL Assistant Legal Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Legal Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Legal Officer position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Assistant Legal Officer post is on a Contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is advised to read it thoroughly before applying.
